$comment: Practice-based movement-screening heuristics (Grade D) mapping a reported injury region to movement_patterns the plan engine should avoid. exclude_patterns are avoided at any severity; caution_patterns are additionally avoided at moderate/severe. Not medical advice — see content/05-recovery/injury-management.

lower-back.note: Loaded spinal flexion/compression can aggravate low-back injury; prefer machine/supported leg and back work.

knee.note: Deep loaded knee flexion; prefer machine and controlled-range leg work.

shoulder.note: Overhead and heavy pressing stress an irritated shoulder; prefer neutral-grip machine work in a pain-free range.

elbow.note: Direct arm isolation can aggravate elbow tendinopathy; reduce volume and prefer neutral grips.

wrist.note: Loaded wrist flexion/extension; avoid direct wrist work while symptomatic.

hip.note: Deep loaded hip flexion; prefer controlled ranges and machine support.

neck.note: Avoid direct neck loading while symptomatic.

ankle.note: Loaded plantarflexion; reduce calf work while symptomatic.
